languages.text: "Инквизитор аф Иррамон, раз уж я послужил{mf||а} вашему делу. Дозволите задать пару вопросов?"

traits.locale_text: "Инквизитор аф Иррамон, раз уж я послужил{mf||а} вашему делу. Дозволите задать пару вопросов?"

languages.text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"
languages.original_text: "Инквизитор аф Иррамон, раз уж я послужил{mf||а} вашему делу. Дозволите задать пару вопросов?"

traits.locale_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"
"Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"
"Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"

languages.text: “审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙，看在我一直为你的事业效力的份上，能问你几个问题吗？”
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"

traits.locale_text: “审判官阿夫·伊拉蒙，看在我一直为你的事业效力的份上，能问你几个问题吗？”

languages.text: « Inquisiteur af Irramon, moi qui ai servi votre cause, vous permettez que je vous pose quelques questions ? »
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"

traits.locale_text: « Inquisiteur af Irramon, moi qui ai servi votre cause, vous permettez que je vous pose quelques questions ? »

languages.text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon, hizmette bulunduğuma göre birkaç soru sorabilir miyim?"
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"

traits.locale_text: "Engizisyoncu af İrramon, hizmette bulunduğuma göre birkaç soru sorabilir miyim?"

languages.text: «Inquisidor af Irramon, ya que he servido a su causa, ¿puedo hacerle unas preguntas?».
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"

traits.locale_text: «Inquisidor af Irramon, ya que he servido a su causa, ¿puedo hacerle unas preguntas?».

languages.text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, nachdem ich Eurer Sache gedient habe, darf ich Euch einige Fragen stellen?"
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"

traits.locale_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, nachdem ich Eurer Sache gedient habe, darf ich Euch einige Fragen stellen?"

languages.text: 「イラモンの審問官、私の貢献を認められたならば、いくつか質問させてください」
languages.original_text: "Inquisitor af Irramon, since I have served your cause, may I ask you a few questions?"

traits.locale_text: 「イラモンの審問官、私の貢献を認められたならば、いくつか質問させてください」
